creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Core memory! 💛

It’s been 6 months since my last post; my longest social media hiatus to date. Thanks to everyone who stayed and sent me lovely messages. 😘 

I have so many stories to tell that I don’t know where to start. So, let me share this family reel that we created last May first. 

Catch up soon! 💗

#family #Dubai #UAE  #ladyandhersweetescapes #dubaireels

transcription.text: Cause no matter if our blue skies turn to grey There's a ray of sun that's bound to light our way
